summary: Complete testing of Live Pricing Engine module with 3 AI agents. All 10 backend tests PASSED. Frontend fully functional with MaterialCatalogPage, lookup dialog, PricingPanel integration in SMR Analysis, and navigation link all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test data created by pytest: 4 materials cached (Латекс интериорен, Грунд, Гипсова мазилка, Шпакловка финишна), Pricing Integration Test analysis with materials
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Pricing Engine module fully tested. Key data-testids: material-catalog-page, lookup-btn, lookup-input, lookup-search-btn, filter-category, pricing-panel, fetch-all-prices-btn. Sidebar link 'Ценообразуване' at /pricing. PricingPanel appears in SMR Analysis detail page for lines with materials.

GET /api/pricing/material?name=X - singl.note: Returns prices from 3 agents with median calculation

POST /api/pricing/refresh?name=X - force.note: Bypasses cache and fetches fresh prices

POST /api/pricing/batch - batch pricing.note: Returns prices for multiple materials in parallel

GET /api/pricing/catalog - catalog listi.note: Lists all cached materials with prices

POST /api/smr-analyses/{id}/lines/{lineI.note: Updates material unit_prices from live pricing

Lookup price dialog works.note: Shows 3 agent breakdown with recommended price

Fetch all prices button in PricingPanel.note: Updates material prices and recalculates totals

Material detail dialog in PricingPanel.note: Shows agent breakdown with confidence and freshness

agents.Agent 1 (BG retail stores): SIMULATED - Практикер, Mr.Bricolage, Баумакс with realistic BG market prices
agents.Agent 2 (Online catalogs): SIMULATED - Зора Строй, СтройМаркет БГ, Строймат.бг with realistic prices

mocked_apis.note: Agent 3 (internal DB) is REAL and queries MongoDB collections
